hero.name: GIANCARLO
hero.role: Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud Platform & AI Engineering
summary: I have been programming since the age of eleven. Software development is not just my profession — it is a lifelong discipline driven by curiosity, experimentation, and a deep passion for open source.

Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 25 years of expertise across PHP, Python, and JavaScript — building scalable, secure, and maintainable applications. A web artisan focused on clean architecture and long-term reliability, from high-traffic public platforms to enterprise internal systems supporting Customer Care and call centre operations.

Specialist in backend systems, scripting and automation, modern frontend interfaces, and enterprise APIs — with strong experience in Salesforce ecosystems (LWC, platform integrations, enterprise data workflows) and AI-powered agent interfaces that integrate intelligent workflows into enterprise environments.

Deeply passionate about Linux and open source. Strong hands-on experience with Docker containerisation, CI/CD pipelines, cloud-native deployment, and DevOps practices that ensure scalability, reliability, and operational excellence.

Driven by ownership, technical excellence, and the continuous pursuit of improvement. Open to senior engineering positions, freelance engagements, and technical partnerships — Zürich, remote, or wherever the problem is worth solving.

about: Passionate software engineer since the early home-computer era (Commodore 64, MSX), with a strong focus on cloud-native architectures, containerised systems, and applied AI. Particularly enthusiastic about Docker-based development and operations.

Career progression from advanced technical support into full-stack engineering, cloud infrastructure, data engineering, Salesforce DevOps, and AI systems. Originally from Italy, raised between Germany and Sicily, now based in eastern Canton Zurich, Switzerland. Proud father of a wonderful daughter.

experience.role: Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud Platform, Salesforce DevOps & AI
experience.summary: 13+ years of progressive ownership across full-stack development, Salesforce DevOps, cloud infrastructure, data engineering, and applied AI at one of Switzerland's leading telecommunications companies.
achievements: Salesforce DevOps Engineer: CI/CD pipelines, release management, custom Apex, LWC components, Flows, and API integrations.
Drove DevOps transformation: LAMP/LEMP to FrankenPHP on Docker/GCP/RHEL, GitLab CI/Jenkins pipelines, release automation.
Developed AMP — internal call centre portal (Laravel/Vue.js/Oracle/MySQL/Redis/Elasticsearch) with multilingual ticket tools, distribution, and feedback systems.
Built Jordan AI (Liberty Global) — Python/FastAPI + Vue.js AI tool for real-time call analysis across Liberty Global subsidiaries.
Architected cloud-native services on GCP: compute, networking, IAM, Cloud Run.
Modernised legacy PHP applications to Laravel, Vue.js, and Nuxt — improving maintainability, testability, and delivery speed.

experience.role: Full Stack Web Developer / System Engineer
experience.summary: Lead developer and system engineer for three regional properties — siciliaonline.it (touristic platform, 10,000+ daily visitors), gds.it, and blogsicilia — with full ownership of PHP application development, CMS architecture, and Linux server operations.
achievements: Built and scaled PHP/MySQL platforms serving 10,000+ daily visitors across siciliaonline.it, gds.it, and blogsicilia.
Developed custom Joomla/Mambo components, plugins, and templates for newsroom and editorial workflows.
Led platform redesigns improving performance, SEO, and reader engagement.
Managed full LAMP stack: Apache, MySQL, server hardening, and high-availability ops.

projects.name: AMP — Application Management Portal
projects.description: Full-stack call centre productivity suite built for Sunrise agents — a multilingual ticket template engine (4 languages), automated ticket distribution system, and agent-to-agent and company-wide feedback tools. Full ownership from architecture to production.

projects.name: Jordan AI (Liberty Global)
projects.description: International AI-powered call assistant deployed across Liberty Global subsidiaries. Python/FastAPI backend and Vue.js frontend connecting to live call data to generate real-time conversation pre-summaries and automated diagnostics for call centre agents.

contact.headline: Let's work together
contact.subline: Open to senior engineering roles, cloud platform projects, and applied AI engagements.
